  ✓ flags describe.only
  ✓ flags it.only
  ✓ flags it.only.each
  ✓ flags fit(
  ✓ flags fdescribe(
  ✓ flags bare orphaned it.skip (test name only, no reason/ref)
  ✓ flags orphaned xit(
  ✓ allows conditional-runner ternary (env-gated real test)
  ✓ allows self-documenting live env-gate skip
  ✓ allows platform-gated skip with reason
  ✓ allows Playwright conditional test.skip(cond, reason)
  ✓ allows conditional skip with non-marker reason (first arg not a string)
  ✓ allows Playwright annotation-documented skip
  ✓ allows skip referencing the deny-list suppression file
  ✓ allows skip with #issue ref on same line
  ✓ allows skip with tracking comment above
  ✓ allows skip with TODO(#n)
  ✓ ignores it.only inside a comment
  ✓ ignores unrelated .only property
  ✓ clean file passes

self-test PASSED (20/20)
